case_title: GARY FRANKEL et al VS. GEORGE P ALBA et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO APPROVE COMPROMISE OF MINOR'S CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKEL, GARY AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR JESSICA FRANKEL, A MINOR FRANKEL, JESSICA A MINOR UNDER 14 YEARS OF AGE, BY AND THROUGH GUARDIAN AD LITEM
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-20-2002 CONTINUED TO NOV-15-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKEL, GARY AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR JESSICA FRANKEL, A MINOR FRANKEL, JESSICA A MINOR UNDER 14 YEARS OF AGE, BY AND THROUGH GUARDIAN AD LITEM AS TO DEFENDANT ALBA, GEORGE P BUANGAN, DONALD S DOES 1 TO 100 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-17-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-22-2002

ORDER COURT GRANTED MINOR'S COMPROMISE AS FOLLOWS: $2,500.00 COMPROMISE;ZERO COSTS; ZERO FEES; MEDICAL LIEN OF $394.00; NET REMNANT OF $2,106.00 IS TO BE DEPOSITED INTO A BLOCKED ACCOUNT IN PET.'S NAME UNTI COURT GRANTED MINOR'S COMPROMISE: $2,500.00 COMPROMISE; ZERO COSTS/FEES; MEDICAL LIEN OF $394.00; NET REMNANT OF $2,106.00 BLOCKED ACCT. UNTIL MINOR'S MAJORITY.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MINOR'S COMPROMISE ON CALENDAR IN SCD 218 AT 9:00 A.M. ON APRIL 29, 2002. HEARING SET FOR APR-29-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-15-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINUTES FOR APR-29-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218

RECEIPT AND ACKNOWLEGMENT OF ORDER FOR THE DEPOSIT OF MONEY INTO BLOCKED ACCOUNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANKEL, GARY AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR JESSICA FRANKEL, A MINOR FRANKEL, JESSICA A MINOR UNDER 14 YEARS OF AGE, BY AND THROUGH GUARDIAN AD LITEM

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF APR-29-2002, MINOR'S COMPROMISE ON CALENDAR IN SCD 218 AT 9:00 A.M. ON APRIL 29, 2002. GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER OF COMM. LORETTA M. NORRIS, W/ MITCH LYON, CSR, AND FRANK M. HENTON, CT. CLERK.
ORDER ORD. TO DEPOSIT MONEY IN BLOCKED ACCOUNT FILED APRIL 29, 2002. ORD. TO DEPOSIT MONEY IN BLOCKED ACCOUNT FILED APRIL 29, 2002.
